query:
ALTER TABLE play_sessions
  ADD COLUMN learnerName    varchar(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN learnerEmail   varchar(320) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN learnerId      varchar(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN learnerGroup   varchar(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN customData     text         NULL,
  ADD COLUMN utmSource      varchar(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN utmMedium      varchar(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN utmCampaign    varchar(128) NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2mhhtxpXA9Esras.7d3251b537d6 --database fJXMsdmk8vcb8V4GDt37f6 --execute

  ADD COLUMN learnerName    varchar(255) NULL,

  ADD COLUMN learnerId      varchar(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN learnerGroup   varchar(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN customData     text         NULL,
  ADD COLUMN utmSource      varchar(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN utmMedium      varchar(128) NULL,
